description: Specify the type of mesh. By default, 3- and 4-sided regular blocks use structured mesh. This command specifies if unstructured mesh should be used for such blocks.

keywords.name: mixed
keywords.description: Use structured mesh for 3- and 4-sided blocks and unstructured mesh for all other blocks. This is the default option.

keywords.name: unstructured
keywords.description: Use unstructured mesh for all blocks. If this option is used and mesh mode (see sketch mesh mode ) is set to quad, triangular blocks will be meshed with quadrilaterals only (the amount of zones per perimeter should be even).
